definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: Music is good for the soul.]

definitions.usage_context_en: The spiritual or non-physical part of a person.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: She has a free spirit.]
definitions.pronunciation_guide_es: [PRONUNCIACIÓN EN FR PARA HABLANTES DE EN]
definitions.usage_context_en: The non-physical part of a person, seen as their true self; a person's mood or attitude.

definitions.usage_example: [TRADUCIR AL FR: He tried to hide his identity.]

definitions.usage_context_en: The facts or characteristics that define who or what a person or thing is.
